content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with NIFTY +1.30%, Auto leading +2.27%, Realty +2.23%, IT +1.49%, all major sectors green and VIX down -5.98% to 16.97. Existing book is +1.24% on the day with multiple positions running into profit. Focus is on managing winners (trailing SLs to lock gains) rather than adding new exposure given 50% deployed and a weak rolling 5-day record (14% win rate, profit factor 0.4x).",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24060,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1045.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+7.9% unrealized; price at 1061 broke above prior swing. Tightening SL from 1040.56 to 1045 to lock in ~6.2% gain. Q4 results strong (PAT +18% YoY, GNPA 0.93%). Target 1110 retained — within 52w high zone."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-2.2% unrealized but defensive hedge with Fed decision today and US-Iran tensions still active. SL 119 is below 20-SMA support (122.12). Holding as portfolio insurance. No SL change — already tight enough at ~3% below entry."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1445.00,
      "new_target": 1485.00,
      "confidence": 0.72,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+3.5% unrealized; broke above prior 52w high (1437.90) on strong Q4 (PAT +27% YoY). Trailing SL from 1438 to 1445 locks in ~2.3% gain above breakeven. Target 1485 intact — momentum continues."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 405.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+0.7% unrealized; SL is at entry (404.50). Moving to 405 (just above breakeven) — modest but positive trail. Stock holding above VWAP 407 with Q4 results May 15 ahead. Power cluster mixed but core thesis (regulated PSU) intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+1.0% unrealized; SL 1742 is just below entry, providing tight protection. Organon $11.75B deal raises leverage concerns and analyst notes flag 'lack of growth visibility'. MACD bearish crossover. Keeping current SL — not raising further given event risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 319.00,
      "new_target": 335.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+0.5% unrealized; near 52-week high. Tightening SL from 318.50 to 319.00 (just below VWAP 320.88). Record 256 GW peak demand backdrop bullish. Q4 results May 19 — manageable timeframe. Target 335 retained."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 472.00,
      "new_target": 495.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "+3.0% unrealized; +6.73% surge today on Q4 beat (PAT +11% YoY, dividend Rs 5.25). Breaking above prior 52w high (476). Trailing SL from 475 down slightly to 472 to give room for breakout consolidation while still locking >0.6% gain. Target 495 intact."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 615.00,
      "new_target": 660.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "+1.2% unrealized but ex-dividend tomorrow (Rs 11/share record date Apr 30) will mechanically reduce price by ~Rs 11. Tightening SL only marginally to 615 — must account for ex-div drop or risk false stop-out. Strong Q4 (+67.6% PAT) and zinc at multi-year highs supportive. Target 660 retained."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1045.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in ~6.2% gain; price has run from 984 to 1061 in days."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; SL already adequate at -5% from entry."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1445.00,
      "reasoning": "Breakout above 52w high; protect 2%+ gain."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 405.00,
      "reasoning": "Move SL just above breakeven."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "MACD bearish crossover and deal-execution risk; tight current SL adequate."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 319.00,
      "reasoning": "Marginal trail near breakeven on 52w high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 472.00,
      "reasoning": "Strong breakout day; need room for consolidation but lock gains."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 615.00,
      "reasoning": "Ex-dividend Rs 11 tomorrow — modest SL adjustment to avoid mechanical stop-out."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BANDHANBNK, BAJFINANCE, ONGC, RELIANCE, MARUTI, ITC, GRSE, BHARTIARTL — all showing strong momentum but chasing breakouts after the index has already run +1.3% intraday is poor entry timing. CANFINHOME contrarian setup is interesting (-4.1% on results day after 30% PAT growth) but needs a clear reversal candle before considering. TATACHEM gap is fading (818 → 793) — avoid; Q4 results May 4 likely weak based on Q3 loss. INDUSINDBK and IIFL volume surges noted but no clean entry now. Will reassess these tomorrow.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 50% deployed across 8 positions, well-diversified across financials, FMCG, energy, pharma, metals and gold ETF. Today's +1.24% MTM is encouraging but rolling 5-day stats (14% WR, PF 0.4x) demand discipline — focus is preservation, not addition. No new entries today: (a) market already up sharply, chasing is poor R:R; (b) Fed decision tonight is binary event risk; (c) HINDZINC ex-div tomorrow needs management. Three pending orders (GLENMARK, PHARMABEES, TATAPOWER) are stale (>5 hrs / multi-day old) — leaving them as-is for now since prices haven't blown through, but will review next cycle for cancellation if still unfilled."
}
